title: Compress this PDF
intro: Photos and scanned pages are what make a PDF big, so they get re-saved at a smaller size. Text and graphics stay exactly as they are.
footnote: Stronger levels make photos softer. If compressing would make this file bigger, you'll get your original back untouched.
alreadyOptimised: This PDF is already well optimised, so there's little to trim. Your file is unchanged.
detailRecompressed_one: {{count}} image recompressed at {{level}}. Photos and scans may look slightly softer — text and graphics are unchanged.
detailRecompressed_other: {{count}} images recompressed at {{level}}. Photos and scans may look slightly softer — text and graphics are unchanged.
detailEfficient: The images here were already efficient, so only the file's structure was tidied.
detailUnsupported: This browser can't recompress images, so only the file's structure was tidied.
